name: audio_translation
description: Real-time bidirectional audio translation for video calls

audio_source_mode.description: Audio source: microphone (calls), system audio (desktop/loopback), or YouTube transcript (URL-based)

loopback_device.description: WASAPI loopback device index for system audio capture (null = default output device)

youtube_url.description: YouTube video URL to fetch timed transcript from (used in youtube mode)

auto_detect_language.description: Auto-detect source language via Whisper or YouTube transcript metadata instead of manual selection

target_language.description: Target language (what you want to hear)

bidirectional.description: Enable bidirectional translation (auto-detect and translate both ways)

whisper_model.description: Whisper model size (larger = more accurate but slower)

use_gpu.description: Use GPU acceleration for Whisper (3-5x faster)

vad_enabled.description: Enable Voice Activity Detection (reduces false transcriptions)

silence_threshold.description: Seconds of silence before processing speech (lower = faster, less accurate)

min_audio_length.description: Minimum audio duration in seconds to transcribe (filters noise)

voice_id.description: Selected voice ID (null = auto-select best available). Supports system voices, Coqui models, custom clones, and voice packs.

tts_speed.description: TTS speech rate (80-300, only applies to pyttsx3 system voices)

duck_enabled.description: Lower source audio volume while TTS is speaking (requires pycaw on Windows)

duck_level.description: Volume level (0-100%) to duck source audio to during TTS playback

parallel_processing.description: Run capture/STT/translation/TTS on separate threads with queues for overlapping execution (higher throughput, more resource usage)

show_subtitle_overlay.description: Display translated text as on-screen subtitles in a floating overlay

subtitle_font_size.description: Font size for the subtitle overlay (12-48)

bilingual_subtitles.description: Show original text above the translation in the subtitle overlay
